title: Hollings Pig Ears Dog Treats, 100% Natural Air Dried Long Lasting Chews for Adult Dogs, Grain Free & High in Protein (Pack of 10)
features: HOLLINGS CHOICE CUTS - 100% natural tasty treats inspired by the principle of minimising waste, created from your dog's favourite sources of protein: chicken, beef or pork.

SUPPORTS JOINTS & MOBILITY & PROMOTES CLEAN TEETH - These longer lasting chews are great for encouraging chewing which not only mentally stimulates your dog helping to reduce boredom, but also releases saliva to promote clean teeth. Pig Ears also contain a natural source of Glucosamine and Chondroitin that can help support your dog’s joints and mobility.

GRAIN FREE, NO RAWHIDE & HIGH IN PROTEIN - Our Pig Ears are 100% natural, grain free and do not contain any artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. These meaty treats are also a great source of protein for your dog and a natural alternative to rawhide.

A COMPLEMENTARY PET FOOD FOR ADULT DOGS OF ALL BREEDS - Treat your dog to something they will love to chew on - our Pig Ears are great to use as a natural treat or reward. These treats are not suitable for puppies, dogs with poor teeth or elderly dogs.

GIFTS FROM NATURE - Hollings natural dogs treats are made from 100% natural ingredients and are loved by dogs and owners alike. Established over 40 years ago, we are committed to offer the highest quality naturally healthy treats.
